title: arctostaphylos minor
intro: Arctostaphylos minor, also known as the green mountain manzanita, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Ericaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Arctostaphylos minor include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Arctostaphylos minor can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support digestive health and reduce inflammation.
